response.text:
I added an eye-related measurement, not a full eye diagram plot.

What I see on the screen:
- CH1 yellow waveform is still displayed in normal waveform view.
- The right-side measurement pane now shows:
  - Meas 1: Frequency, μ: 7.855 MHz
  - Meas 2: Eye High, μ: 3.158 V
- So the scope accepted `EYEHIGH` as a measurement on CH1.
- I do not see a separate eye diagram display or plot window; the main display is still the standard time-domain waveform.

What I did:
- Sent `MEASUrement:ADDMEAS EYEHIGH`
- Sent `MEASUrement:MEAS2:SOURCE CH1`

So an eye-related measurement was successfully added, but this did not create a full eye diagram visualization. If you want, I can keep exploring the Plot commands and try to create an actual eye diagram display next.
